title: Tropical Nullstellensatz Descent — Kapranov for Cycles

analysis.object: T762: Tropical Nullstellensatz Descent — Kapranov for Cycles depth analysis

kapranov_for_hypersurfaces.description: Kapranov: tropical hypersurface = tropicalization of classical hypersurface

extension_to_cycles.description: Does Kapranov extend from hypersurfaces to higher codimension cycles?

intersection_theory.description: Tropical intersection theory: tropical cycles = intersections of tropical hypersurfaces

classical_analog.description: Classical analog: every cycle = intersection of hypersurfaces (Bertini theorem)

descent_via_intersection.description: If tropical cycle = tropical intersection and classical = classical intersection, lift intersections

intersection_obstruction.description: Tropical intersection != classical intersection of lifts in codim >= 2 -- non-trivial correction

t762_result.description: T762: Nullstellensatz descent works modulo intersection correction terms. Correction terms are EML-3 -- new sub-gap identified.
t762_result.reason: Progress: gap localized to intersection correction

analysis.theorem: T762: Tropical Nullstellensatz Descent — Kapranov for Cycles (S1041).

key_theorem: T762: Tropical Nullstellensatz Descent — Kapranov for Cycles (S1041).
